title: [ImportVerilog] Modify sampled value functions to use Comb operators
body:
In particular, this PR concerns the sampled value functions `$rose`, `$fell`, and `$stable`, since `$changed` had already been implemented as discussed below in [my previous PR](https://github.com/llvm/circt/pull/9634).

Previously, `ltl::PastOp` would return `ltl.sequence`, and so it was necessary to use other LTL operators to perform the computations required by these sampled value functions. @TaoBi22's [PR](https://github.com/llvm/circt/pull/9525) modified `ltl::PastOp` to return `i1` instead, and as such, this PR simplifies the computation significantly by using existing `comb` operators.

I'd really appreciate if this could be reviewed! @TaoBi22 @Scheremo
